display_name_sources: source_facts.description identifies V as the programming language; source_facts.homepage is the official V language site.
docs_sources: Official V language site provides dedicated documentation at https://docs.vlang.io/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/vlang/v; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a programming language; source_facts.executables lists the V compiler command v.
